concerns.text: T030 implements threshold detection but omits the bootstrapping requirement (1000 resamples, 95% CI) mandated by SC-004 and FR-006. The task description only mentions rounding and threshold detection, silently weakening the statistical rigor required to validate the 'safe operating zone' boundary.

T014 describes producing 'ground-truth execution logs' but fails to explicitly mandate the comparison logic against the Oracle Policy Engine (T013) to generate the violation flags required by FR-002 and SC-001. Without explicit instruction to compare against the Oracle, the task risks producing a simulator log that does not measure deviation, violating the independence principle.

Constitution Principle V (Versioning Discipline) requires updating the state registry with artifact hashes after every artifact change. T008 creates the initial file, and T033 updates it at the end, but no task exists to update the state registry immediately after the synthetic data generation (Phase 3) or intermediate execution steps, creating a gap in the versioning chain.
